title: JmapRequestBuilder: catch duplicate call IDs at build time
description:
## Why

JmapRequestBuilder::add_call accepts any call ID string and does not validate uniqueness. A caller who adds two invocations with the same ID gets no error until call_batch receives the server response and finds duplicate keys. The builder has all the information to catch this at build() time.

## What needs to be done

Change build() to return Result<JmapRequest, ClientError> (InvalidArgument). During add_call, accumulate used call IDs in a HashSet. In build(), detect duplicates and return Err. Alternatively, panic in add_call with a clear message (the builder is not sent across await points, so panic is acceptable for programmer error). Update all call sites that call build() -- tests and production code -- to handle the new return type.
